noAccess.title: No access
noAccess.description: You do not have permission to view the Secret Manager. Contact an administrator to request access.

session.lockHint: Lock the Secret Manager session and clear the in-memory key
session.unlockHint: Click to unlock the Secret Manager

unlock.title: Unlock Secret Manager
unlock.description: Enter your vault passphrase to unlock this session.
unlock.recoveryDescription: Enter your recovery key to unlock this session.
unlock.lostBoth: I lost both my passphrase and recovery key
unlock.recoveryFailed: Incorrect recovery key. Please check the format and try again.
unlock.loadError: Failed to load your keypair. Please refresh the page and try again.
unlock.alreadySetUpNote: Your Secret Manager is already set up. The recovery key is shown only once, during setup, and is not displayed here. If you've lost your passphrase, use the option below.

bootstrap.title: Set up your Secret Manager
bootstrap.description: Create a vault passphrase to secure your personal encryption key. This passphrase cannot be recovered by anyone, including administrators.
bootstrap.passphraseHint: At least 8 characters. Choose something strong and memorable.
bootstrap.tooShort: Passphrase must be at least 8 characters.
bootstrap.warning: Your passphrase is never sent to the server. If you lose it and your recovery key, your vault data will be permanently inaccessible.
bootstrap.error: Failed to create keypair. Please try again.
bootstrap.createdDescription: Your keypair was created and your recovery key saved, but the session could not be unlocked automatically. Enter your passphrase below to unlock — your keypair is safe and was not lost.
bootstrap.unlockFailed: Could not unlock with that passphrase. Make sure it matches the one you just set.

reset.title: Reset your identity
reset.description: Set a new vault passphrase. This creates a brand-new encryption keypair — you will lose access to all vaults until a vault admin re-grants each one.
reset.regrantWarning: Warning: after reset, you will not be able to read any vault until a current member re-grants you access. Coordinate with your team before proceeding.
reset.error: Failed to reset keypair. Please try again.
reset.createdDescription: Your new keypair was created and your recovery key saved, but the session could not be unlocked automatically. Enter your new passphrase below to unlock — your keypair is safe and was not lost.
reset.unlockFailed: Could not unlock with that passphrase. Make sure it matches the new one you just set.

recoveryKey.title: Save your recovery key
recoveryKey.description: This is the only backup for your vault access. It is shown exactly once and cannot be retrieved again — save it somewhere safe before continuing.
recoveryKey.copyFailed: Copy is unavailable here (your connection is not secure). Select the key above and copy it manually before continuing — this is your only copy.
recoveryKey.warning: Store this key outside the system — a password manager, a printed copy in a secure location. If you lose your passphrase and this key, your encrypted data is permanently inaccessible.
recoveryKey.acknowledge: I have saved my recovery key in a secure place.

list.title: Secret Manager
list.subtitle: Zero-knowledge encrypted vaults for credentials and secrets.
list.emptyDescription: Create a vault to store encrypted secrets. Only vault members can decrypt them.
list.unlockToCreate: Unlock your Secret Manager first, then create a vault.

vaults.createDescription: A vault holds encrypted secrets shared only with its members. The server never sees plaintext values.
vaults.nameHint: A short, descriptive name visible to vault members.
vaults.createError: Failed to create vault. Please try again.

detail.subtitle: Encrypted secrets — only vault members can decrypt values.
detail.notMember: You are not a member of this vault, so its secrets cannot be decrypted. Ask a current member to grant you access.
detail.membershipError: Could not verify your vault membership. Please refresh the page and try again.

items.empty: No secrets in this vault yet. Add the first one.
items.copyFailed: Copy failed — select and copy manually.
items.revealError: Decryption failed. The vault key may have changed.
items.notMember: You are not a member of this vault — its secrets cannot be revealed.
items.dekUnavailable: Session key unavailable. Please lock and unlock the Secret Manager.
items.dekUnavailableInline: The vault key could not be unwrapped. Lock and unlock the Secret Manager, then try saving again — your entry is preserved.
items.addDescription: The value is encrypted in your browser before being stored. The server never sees the plaintext.
items.handleHint: A unique machine identifier used in Knowledge Base chips ({{ lazyit_secret.handle }}). Lowercase letters, numbers, underscores, dots, and hyphens only.
items.valueHint: Encrypted locally before storage. Never sent in plaintext.
items.createError: Failed to add secret. Please try again.
items.editDescription: Update the label or handle. To change the value, enter a new one — it will be re-encrypted before saving.
items.newValuePlaceholder: Leave blank to keep the current value
items.newValueHint: If entered, re-encrypted locally before saving. The old ciphertext is replaced.
items.updateError: Failed to update secret. Please try again.
items.deleteDescription: Delete "{label}"? The ciphertext is soft-deleted and will no longer be accessible.
items.deleteError: Failed to delete secret. Please try again.

chip.lockedTooltip: You don't have access to this secret's vault.
chip.brokenTooltip: This secret reference is broken — no secret with this handle exists.
chip.copyFailed: Copy failed — select and copy manually.
chip.unlockDescription: Enter your vault passphrase to reveal this secret inline.
chip.bootstrapDescription: You haven't set up your Secret Manager yet. Create a vault passphrase to continue — your recovery key is shown only once.

members.singleMemberWarning: This vault has only one member. If you lose your passphrase and recovery key, the vault will be permanently inaccessible — consider adding a second member.
members.revokeSemanticNote: Revoking a member prevents future decryption of vault secrets but does not invalidate any values they have already revealed. If a secret may be compromised, rotate the real credential.
members.addDescription: Select a user to grant access. The vault key will be securely wrapped to their public key in your browser.
members.noEligible: Everyone already has access to this vault.
members.usersLoadError: Failed to load users. Please refresh the page and try again.
members.targetNoKeypair: This user must set up their Secret Manager before you can grant them access.
members.noPublicKey: This user has not set up their Secret Manager yet. Ask them to open the Secret Manager first.
members.grantDekUnavailable: Session key unavailable. Please lock and unlock the Secret Manager.
members.granted: {name} has been granted access to this vault.
members.grantError: Failed to grant access. Please try again.
members.cannotRemoveLast: Cannot remove the last member of a vault. Add another member first.
members.revokeDescription: Remove {name} from this vault? They will no longer be able to decrypt vault secrets.
members.revokeError: Failed to revoke access. Please try again.
